item.title: 변이 클러스터링 연구 #6 HLA 결합력 변화 비교
item.description: 변이 클러스터링 연구 #6 HLA 결합력 변화 비교 # #2025-06-27 1. Load package # import pandas as pd import numpy as np 2. Load affinity data # with open('/data/home/ysh980101/2411/data-mhc/patient_id.txt', 'r') as file: patients = [line.strip() for line in file] len(patients) 388 #387+reference 3. Merge affinity tables # hotspot = "c315" dfs = [] for pid in patients: file_path = f"/data/home/ysh980101/2411/data-mhc/{hotspot}/{pid}/binding_affinities_HLA-I.csv" df = pd.read_csv(file_path) df.rename(columns={'Affinity': f'{pid}'}, inplace=True) df.rename(columns={'Peptide': f'Peptide_{pid}'}, inplace=True) if pid == 'reference': dfs.
